description: Account. Revenue from rent ca. 1230. A record of revenue listing 27 tenants of the qodesh. The first part is canceled by a stroke of the pen. This, and the word nuqila, i.e. "transcribed," show that the contens of such leaves used to be posted into notebooks. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 441 #132)
description_he: חשבון הכנסות שכירות, כ-1230. 27 שוכרים של ההקדש. הרישום הוכן לצורך העתקה לפנקס.
